message:
feat(telemetry): Add network benchmark for worker throughput and latency

Implements SSH-based network performance measurement including:
- Upload/download throughput via rsync with compression disabled
- Latency measurement via SSH echo commands with jitter calculation
- Composite scoring: upload (35%), download (40%), latency (25%)
- Builder pattern with configurable payload size, samples, timeout
- Comprehensive test suite (12 tests)

This unblocks SpeedScore calculation (w45) which depends on network metrics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
